text: - Note for #99: the **ordinal label** (`claude1`) ‚Äî not the codename ‚Äî is now the primary same-agent disambiguator on the wire. The `slug-codename` form in `display_who_*` is legacy snapshot-table behavior. [...] - **Targeting** ‚Äî relax the mention gate in `idref.rs` to accept `@haiku`/`@haiku1`; delete `find_session_by_codename` + the "must name a concrete session codename" bail in `chat_write.rs`. `resolve_agent_pubkey("haiku1", host)` already resolves the label‚Üíselected-pubkey (each instance publishes kind:0 under its display label), so this is mostly deletion.
